meaning: n.<美>[植] 疯草(牲畜食后引起疯草病)
examples: The topic of this paper is the present situation of locoweed in China.
The locoweed is one of kind poisonous plants that endangers the husbandry seriously in the world, and causes enormous economic losses.
This article summarized the three toxic constituent of locoweed: aliphatic nitro compound, selenium and selenide, locoweed toxin (alkaloids).
